executives.name: Carey Smith
executives.background: Ms. Smith has served as our Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer since April 2022. She previously served as our President and Chief Executive Officer from July 2021 to April 2022, and as our President and Chief Operating Officer from 2018 to 2021. She joined Parsons in 2016 as President of the Federal Solutions business unit.

tenure_dates.title: Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Matthew Ofilos
executives.background: Mr. Ofilos has served as our Chief Financial Officer since July 2022. He joined Parsons in 2021 as Executive Vice President, Finance. Prior to joining Parsons, he held various leadership roles at Amazon Web Services and Lockheed Martin.

executives.name: Mark Van De Voorde
executives.background: Mr. Van De Voorde has served as our Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary since 2017. Prior to joining Parsons, he was the Chief Legal Officer and Chief Administrative Officer of Victaulic Company.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Carey Smith
board_of_directors.background: Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer of Parsons Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Letitia Long
board_of_directors.background: Former Director of the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency. She has served on our board since 2015.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Leer
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Arch Coal, Inc. He has served on our board since 2013.

board_of_directors.name: George Ball
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of Sanders Morris Harris. He has served on our board since 2012.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Holdsworth
board_of_directors.background: Co-Founder and Managing Partner of Tennenbaum Capital Partners. He has served on our board since 2019.
